description: This is a Java test class for Spring Boot application, specifically testing the SystemController's web endpoints. It uses MockMvc to perform HTTP GET requests to various health and info endpoints to ensure they are publicly accessible and return expected responses.

classes.name: test_system_controller_webmvc_test
classes.description: JUnit test class for testing the web endpoints of SystemController in a Spring Boot application.

methods.name: getRoot_isPublic
methods.description: Tests that the root endpoint '/' returns a welcome message and is publicly accessible.

methods.name: getHealth_isPublic
methods.description: Tests that the '/health' endpoint returns 'OK' indicating a healthy system.

methods.name: getInfo_isPublic
methods.description: Tests that the '/api/info' endpoint returns application info message.
